creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=002bd26b5114ca837d595e2c2c08bb60a970ec7b

commit 002bd26b5114ca837d595e2c2c08bb60a970ec7b
Author:     Benoît Guillemaud <benoit@guillemaud.fr>
AuthorDate: 2024-09-30 17:03:16 +0000
Commit:     Fernando Apesteguía <fernape@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2024-10-02 20:46:51 +0000

    net-p2p/radarr: Update to 5.11.0.9244

    ChangeLog: https://github.com/Radarr/Radarr/releases/tag/v5.11.0.9244

     * Fixed: Loading movie images after placeholder in Safari
     * Sort allowed sorting keys
     * Multiple Translations updated by Weblate
     * Fix translations for MovieMonitoredSelectInput
     * Use UTC to calculate movie status
     * Convert AvailabilitySelectInput to TypeScript
     * Add movie availability descriptions
     * Fixed: Telegram Log Message
     * Automated API Docs update
     * Prevent line wraps on mobile for ratings

    PR:             281725
    Reported by:    benoit@guillemaud.fr
    Approved by:    michiel@vanbaak.eu (maintainer)

 net-p2p/radarr/Makefile  |  2 +-
 net-p2p/radarr/distinfo  |  6 +++---
 net-p2p/radarr/pkg-plist | 19 ++++++++++---------
 3 files changed, 14 insertions(+), 13 deletions(-)
